title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.470 - Conservators, liable for waste, when
text:
537.470.  Conservators, liable for waste, when. — If a conservator commit waste of the estate of his protectee, he shall be liable to the protectee for damages, at the expiration of his conservatorship.
(RSMo 1939 § 3008, A.L. 1983 S.B. 44 & 45) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2621; 1919 § 6915; 1909 § 7918
